creator: n4jm4@pm.me
text:
The FreeBSD Vagrant repository appears to offer v11.0-RELEASE:

https://app.vagrantup.com/freebsd/boxes/FreeBSD-11.0-RELEASE

However, when I try to actually reference this box in a Vagrantfile, vagrant reports the box as unavailable. Other versions like 11.1-RELEASE do successfully download, so I wonder if there is something wrong with 11.0-RELEASE in the vagrant repository?

Could someone get in touch with the Vagrant FreeBSD box maintainers and republish this version?
